author: merrier
description: Sync Obsidian notes to GitHub-backed Markdown static-site blogs with image handling and status tracking. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: merrier
manifest.description: Sync notes to GitHub-backed Markdown static-site blogs with image handling and status tracking.
manifest.name: Blog Bridge

name: Blog Bridge

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Blog Bridge 1.1.0

This is the public-ready release line for Blog Bridge. It rolls up the setup, review, and status-page refinements from the 1.0.x preparation releases into a cleaner starting point.

### Highlights
- Sync Markdown notes to GitHub-backed static-site blog repositories.
- Supports Hexo, Hugo, Jekyll, Astro, VitePress, and MkDocs presets.
- Handles local image export and GitHub commit creation.
- Includes a status page with search, tag filtering, pagination, batch sync, and sync history.
- Supports selecting a specific sync source folder or all Markdown files.
- Uses Obsidian SecretStorage for GitHub token storage.

### Notes
- Requires Obsidian 1.11.4 or newer.
- Desktop only.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Blog Bridge 1.0.7

This release adds an explicit all-files sync source option.

### Changed
- Added an "All Markdown files" option to the sync source directory setting.
- Preserved the empty sync source value as an unconfigured state, so the status page still prompts users to configure a source.
- Updated sync source filtering so the all-files option includes every Markdown note while an empty source includes none.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Blog Bridge 1.0.6

This release refines first-time setup and the status page experience.

### Changed
- Updated GitHub owner and repository placeholders to "Your GitHub Name" and "Your GitHub Repository".
- Added a GitHub token save dialog with a ghp_ secret value placeholder and Cancel placed before Save.
- Keep the sync source directory empty by default and show a status-page prompt when it is not configured.
- Added scrolling to the status page note list for larger vault folders.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Blog Bridge 1.0.5

This release addresses an Obsidian Community Plugins CSS compatibility warning.

### Changed

- Replaced `column-gap` and `row-gap` on the status row grid with the shorthand `gap` property.
- Updated plugin release metadata to version `1.0.5`.

### Notes

Release assets are built by GitHub Actions and include artifact attestations for provenance verification.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Blog Bridge 1.0.4

This release prepares Blog Bridge for Obsidian Community Plugins review and adds provenance attestations for release assets.

### Changed

- Added GitHub artifact attestations for `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
- Updated the release workflow to generate provenance metadata for plugin assets.
- Kept the plugin metadata on version `1.0.4` with minimum app version `1.11.4`.

### Review fixes included

- Removed direct `element.style.order` usage in favor of CSS.
- Replaced `fetch` with Obsidian's `requestUrl` for GitHub API calls.
- Updated the plugin command ID to avoid including the plugin ID.
- Addressed Promise handling and TypeScript safety feedback from the review.
- Raised `minAppVersion` to match the SecretStorage APIs used by the plugin.

### Notes

Blog Bridge syncs selected notes to GitHub-backed Markdown static-site blogs with image handling and status tracking.

The plugin is desktop-only because it reads local Markdown notes and local image attachments before uploading selected content to your configured GitHub repository. It uses the GitHub REST API and does not include client-side telemetry, analytics, or advertising.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Blog Bridge 1.0.2

This release addresses Obsidian Community Plugins review feedback.

### Changed

- Removed the word "Obsidian" from the plugin description in `manifest.json`.
- Updated package metadata to match the revised plugin description.
- Updated release metadata for version `1.0.2`.

### Notes

Blog Bridge syncs selected notes to GitHub-backed Markdown static-site blogs with image handling and status tracking.

The plugin is desktop-only because it reads local Markdown notes and local image attachments before uploading selected content to your configured GitHub repository. It uses the GitHub REST API and does not include client-side telemetry, analytics, or advertising.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Blog Bridge 1.0.1

This release prepares Blog Bridge for Obsidian Community Plugins submission.

### Changed

- Renamed the plugin ID to `blog-bridge` to meet Obsidian Community Plugins requirements.
- Renamed the Chinese README from `README_ZH.md` to `README.zh.md`.
- Added privacy and network access disclosures to the documentation.
- Added an MIT `LICENSE` file.
- Updated release metadata for version `1.0.1`.

### Notes

Blog Bridge is desktop-only because it reads local Markdown notes and local image attachments from your Obsidian vault before syncing selected content to your configured GitHub repository.

The plugin uses the GitHub REST API for repository sync operations and does not include client-side telemetry, analytics, or advertising.
